allowMenuOnDisabled.description: Allows menu to be opened if button is disabled.

clickMode.description: Defines which mode button will work in

menuItems.description: setter for menu items as view element config

controlActions.description: setter for control actions as view element config

listActions.description: setter for list actions as view element config

mode.description: Lookup mode (List or Selection Window). List by default.

showSecondaryDisplayValue.description: Shows secondary display value in list.

showValueAsLink.description: State of show value as link.

sortFilteringFn.description: Function for sorting items when filtering.

useStaticFiltering.description: Sets state of using static filtering.

valueChange.description: Emits an event every time the value of the control changes.

components.description: Communication options panel displaying phone, email, and social media contact details with inline editing.
useCases: Display and edit a contact's communication channels (phone, email, web, social)
components.whenToUse: Use on Contact/Account pages to manage communication channels (phone, email, web, social).
components.whenNotToUse: Cannot be used on custom entities — it is bound to the built-in Contact/Account communication model.
components.entityCouplingNote: Bound to the built-in Contact/Account communication model; not available on custom entities.

bulkActions.description: Mass-action menu items shown when one or more rows are selected (requires `features.rows.selection.multiple: true`). Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked` request binding receiving the selected rows.

features.description: Feature toggles controlling editing, selection, header, columns and hierarchy. Shape: `{ rows?: { numeration?, selection? }, editable?: { enable?, itemsCreation?, floatingEditPanel? }, columns?: { adding?, dragAndDrop?, resizing?, sorting? }, header?: { visible? }, hierarchical?: { enable? } }`. Omitted branches inherit framework defaults.

fitContent.description: When true the grid hugs its content width; when false it fills the available width of the parent container.

stretch.description: When true the grid stretches to fill the parent container's available height; otherwise it sizes to its content.

style.description: Visual style of the grid. `plain-white` is the default flat look; `glass-effect` enables glassmorphism and switches toolbar buttons to a light variant.

activeRowChange.description: Action invoked when the user activates a different row (typically single-click). Payload is the row's primary key.

cancelItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user discards pending inline edits. Payload is the list of changed records being reverted.

columnsChange.description: Action invoked when the user edits the column set (add/remove/reorder via the column toolbar). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the updated column definitions.

createItem.description: Action invoked when a new inline row is created (requires `features.editable.itemsCreation: true`). Payload describes the new row position.

deleteItem.description: Action invoked when the user deletes a row via the row toolbar.

hierarchicalRowsStateChange.description: Action invoked when the overall hierarchy expand/collapse state changes. Payload is the full `HierarchyState`.

hierarchicalRowStateChange.description: Action invoked when a single hierarchical row is expanded or collapsed (requires `features.hierarchical.enable: true`).

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the user scrolls to load the next page. Payload includes `rowsOffset` and `pageSize` for the request handler.

rowDoubleClick.description: Action invoked on row double-click — typically used to open the row's record page. Payload is the `DataTableRowContext` for the clicked row.

saveItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user commits pending inline edits (requires `features.editable.enable: true`).

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes the selection (checkbox toggles, select-all). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the full `DataGridRowsSelectionState`.

sortingChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes column sorting via the column toolbar. Payload is the updated sorting config array.

components.description: Tabular list component for ListPage records and inline grid actions.
useCases: Display records in rows and columns with sorting and selection
Show a tabular list of entity records
components.whenToUse: Use for tabular data with columns, sorting, and row selection.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for image/photo collections (use crt.Gallery) or a simple non-tabular list (use crt.List).

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

mode.description: Possible the view that the calendar should be in.

multiYearSelector.description: State of active multiyear view when click on year.

pickerType.description: Possible picker types for crt-picker component.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

preventSameDateTimeSelection.description: Prevent user to select same date time.

readonly.description: When true the date/time picker is locked from user interaction. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

startView.description: Possible the view that the calendar should start in.

timeSelectionInterval.description: Time selection interval used by list-based picker view.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

useTwelveHourFormat.description: Sets state of using twelve-hour format.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Date, time, or datetime picker bound to a page attribute.

bulkActions.description: Mass-action menu items shown when one or more rows are selected (requires `features.rows.selection.multiple: true`). Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked` request binding receiving the selected rows.

droppable.description: Toggle that enables the drag-and-drop zone for file uploads. Pair with the `fileDropped` action to handle dropped files.

fileGroups.description: File category filter. Restricts the visible attachments to specific groups (e.g. `[FileGroupEnum.Attachments]`).

fitContent.description: When true the grid hugs its content width; when false it fills the available width of the parent container.

masterRecordColumnValue.description: Identifier of the parent record. Typically bound as `"$Id"` so the file list shows attachments for the page's master record.

recordColumnName.description: Name of the column on the file entity that references the parent record (e.g. `"RecordId"`).

stretch.description: When true the grid stretches to fill the parent container's available height; otherwise it sizes to its content.

style.description: Visual style of the grid. `plain-white` is the default flat look; `glass-effect` enables glassmorphism and switches toolbar buttons to a light variant.

tag.description: Tag string used to filter files by a custom category. Empty value disables tag filtering.

viewType.description: Layout mode for the file list. `list` renders a data grid; `gallery` renders preview tiles.

activeRowChange.description: Action invoked when the user activates a different row (typically single-click). Payload is the row's primary key.

cancelItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user discards pending inline edits. Payload is the list of changed records being reverted.

columnsChange.description: Action invoked when the user edits the column set (add/remove/reorder via the column toolbar). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the updated column definitions.

createItem.description: Action invoked when a new inline row is created (requires `features.editable.itemsCreation: true`). Payload describes the new row position.

deleteItem.description: Action invoked when the user deletes a row via the row toolbar.

fileDropped.description: Action invoked when files are dropped onto the drop zone (requires `droppable: true`). The payload `{ files }` carries the dropped `File[]`.

hierarchicalRowsStateChange.description: Action invoked when the overall hierarchy expand/collapse state changes. Payload is the full `HierarchyState`.

hierarchicalRowStateChange.description: Action invoked when a single hierarchical row is expanded or collapsed (requires `features.hierarchical.enable: true`).

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the user scrolls to load the next page. Payload includes `rowsOffset` and `pageSize` for the request handler.

rowDoubleClick.description: Action invoked on row double-click — typically used to open the row's record page. Payload is the `DataTableRowContext` for the clicked row.

saveItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user commits pending inline edits (requires `features.editable.enable: true`).

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes the selection (checkbox toggles, select-all). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the full `DataGridRowsSelectionState`.

sortingChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes column sorting via the column toolbar. Payload is the updated sorting config array.

uploadClicked.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the upload button. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` (typically `crt.UploadFileRequest`) to open the file picker.

components.description: File/attachment list component with drag-and-drop upload, gallery/list view modes, and file grouping. Extends DataGrid.
useCases: Display and manage a list of file attachments on a record
components.whenToUse: Use to list and manage file attachments (documents) on a record.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for displaying images as a visual gallery (use crt.Gallery) or a single image (use crt.ImageInput).

alignItems.description: Alignment of children along the cross axis (perpendicular to `direction`). `'stretch'` makes each child fill the cross axis; the other values anchor them.

direction.description: Flow direction of the children — `'row'` lays them out horizontally, `'column'` vertically. The `-reverse` variants flip the order.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

gap.description: Spacing between adjacent children. Accepts a `SizeEnum` keyword (`none`/`xs`/`small`/`medium`/`large`/`xl`/`xxl`) or a raw pixel `number`.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

justifyContent.description: Distribution of children along the main axis. `'start'`/`'end'`/`'center'` cluster them; the `'space-*'` values spread them out with equal gutters; `'stretch'` makes them fill the axis.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

role.description: ARIA `role` attribute applied to the container element. Set only when the container plays a semantic role for assistive tech (e.g. `'toolbar'`, `'navigation'`); leave unset otherwise.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

wrap.description: Wrap behavior when children overflow the main axis. `'wrap'` lets them flow onto new lines; `'nowrap'` keeps them on one line and lets the container scroll instead.

innerScroll.description: Fired when the user scrolls inside the container (when content overflows). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind to a request handler; without a `request` the scroll event is observed but no handler runs.

components.description: Flexbox layout container for vertical or horizontal grouping of child elements.

ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label announced by screen readers.

bulkActions.description: Dropdown actions shown when one or more items are selected. Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked` request binding.

itemConfig.description: Per-item template/binding config (`templateValuesMapping` for caption/description/image column names, `referenceSchema`, `defaultSize`). Most schemas leave it empty and rely on framework defaults.

items.description: Source records to render. Bind via `"$<Attr>"` to a collection attribute (e.g., the data source's `Items` exposed attribute).

itemStyles.description: Inline style object applied to every item wrapper (e.g., `{ background: '...' }`).

mode.description: Item rendering strategy. `component-type` uses a registered view-element type; `view-element-config` renders an inline config provided per item.

multiselect.description: Whether multiple items can be selected at once. Switches the gallery from single-select (`selectedItemId`) to multi-select (`selectionState` + `bulkActions`).

selectable.description: Whether item selection is enabled. When `false`, clicking items does not toggle selection or emit `selectedItemIdChange`.

selectedItemId.description: Currently selected item id (single-select mode). Bind to a data source attribute (`"$<Attr>"`) for two-way sync with `selectedItemIdChange`.

selectionState.description: Multi-select state (`{ type: 'specific', selected: Guid[] }` or `{ type: 'all', unselected: Guid[] }`). Bind via `"$<Attr>"` to round-trip with `selectionStateChange`. `type: 'all'` is coerced to a `'specific'` empty selection at runtime.

itemClick.description: Action invoked when an item is clicked. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the clicked `DataItemModel`.

itemDblClick.description: Action invoked when an item is double-clicked (commonly used to open a record). Same request-binding shape as `itemClick`.

itemEvent.description: Action invoked when an item emits a custom inner event (e.g., a button inside the item template). Payload includes the event and the item.

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the last item enters the viewport (infinite-scroll trigger). Bind to a request that loads the next page.

selectedItemIdChange.description: Action invoked when the selected id changes in single-select mode. Pair with `selectedItemId` for two-way binding.

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the multi-select state changes. Pair with `selectionState` for two-way binding.

components.description: Gallery list component with selectable cards, pagination events, and bulk menu actions.
useCases: Display a collection of images or photos as browsable preview cards
Show a visual catalog of pictures the user can browse and select
Present uploaded media as a browsable gallery
components.whenToUse: Use to display a collection of images/photos as browsable preview cards — the right choice for any image-gallery or photo-grid prompt.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for tabular records with columns (use crt.DataGrid) or a single image field (use crt.ImageInput).

alt.description: Accessibility `alt` text for the rendered image.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

borderRadius.description: Corner rounding. Accepts a `SizeEnum` token (`small`/`medium`/`large`/`extra-large`), a number (px), or any CSS length string (e.g., `'50%'` for a circle).

colorId.description: Seed used by `placeholderMode: 'abbreviation'` to pick a stable background color. Bind to a record id to keep the color consistent per contact/account.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum upload size in bytes. Forwarded as `maxFileSize` on the `imageSelected` payload; the system setting `MaxImageSize` is shown as a placeholder default.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Icon name or abbreviation seed shown when no image is loaded. For `'abbreviation'` `placeholderMode`, seeds initials and background color; for `'icon'` mode, names the icon to display.

placeholderMode.description: Placeholder style when no image is set. `abbreviation` shows initials from `placeholder` over a contact-style color; `icon` shows the icon named by `placeholder`.

positioning.description: Image fit inside the frame (CSS `object-fit`). `cover` crops to fill; `scale-down` shrinks to fit without cropping.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

size.description: Image frame size preset. Ignored when both `customWidth` and `customHeight` are set.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Bound view-model attribute (e.g. `'$PDS_Photo'`) or empty string for unbound. Prefer this property over `control` for image fields.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

imageClear.description: Action invoked when the user clears the current image. Bind to a request that clears the stored value.

imageSelected.description: Action invoked when the user picks a file. Payload: `{ file, maxFileSize }`. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to upload the file via a handler.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Image uploader and preview control. Binds through the value property, not control.
useCases: Upload or display a single image such as an avatar, logo, or cover
components.whenToUse: Use for a single image field — upload/display one picture (avatar, logo, cover).
components.whenNotToUse: Not for a collection of images (use crt.Gallery).

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Generic text input for short, medium, or multiline text values.

caption.description: Label text shown to the user. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized values; numeric `0` is coerced to the string `"0"`, all other falsy values render as empty.

headingLevel.description: Semantic HTML tag the label renders as (`h1`-`h4` for document outline, `label` for form association). Affects accessibility and DOM, not visual style — use `labelType` for typography.

labelBackgroundColor.description: Background color behind the label. Accepts a CSS color, a theme token, or `"transparent"` to disable the fill.

labelColor.description: Font color. Accepts a CSS color or a Creatio theme color token (e.g. `"auto"`, `"primary-color-1"`).

labelEllipsis.description: When `true`, clips overflowing text with an ellipsis rather than wrapping to a new line.

labelTextAlign.description: Horizontal text alignment within the label's box.

labelThickness.description: Font weight applied on top of `labelType`. `default` keeps the preset's intrinsic weight.

labelType.description: Typography preset. Sets the label's font scale and weight family (headlines, body, caption, button, etc.).

components.description: Read-only text label for headings, captions, and inline explanatory copy.

useCases: Display records as a simple vertical list without grid columns
components.whenToUse: Use for a simple vertical list of records without tabular columns.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for columnar/tabular data (use crt.DataGrid) or images (use crt.Gallery).

context.description: View model passed as context to menu items that conditionally show/disable based on row data.

items.description: Menu items as view element config.

menuItems.deprecationReason: Use property . Will be removed in https://creatio.atlassian.net/browse/RND-21872

panelClass.description: CSS class(es) added to the dropdown panel element (space-delimited string).

stopOverlayClickPropagation.description: When `true`, clicks on the CDK overlay backdrop are stopped from propagating to the page. Use inside modals or overlays to prevent unintended close-on-outside-click behavior.

useGlassmorphism.description: Applies a blurred glass-effect style to the dropdown panel backdrop.

xPosition.description: Horizontal alignment of the dropdown panel relative to its trigger: `"before"` or `"after"`.

yPosition.description: Vertical placement of the dropdown panel relative to its trigger: `"above"` or `"below"`.

components.description: Dropdown/context menu container used for both desktop (Freedom UI) and mobile pages. Holds `crt.MenuItem` entries provided via the `items` input and can be triggered programmatically or embedded inside a `crt.Button` via `menuItems`. Supports nested sub-menus, glassmorphism backdrop, and configurable open position.

currentPage.description: Current page index used for paging operations.

isCombinedMode.description: Indicates whether the list is displayed in a combined layout mode.

itemsList.description: Collection of ViewModel items displayed by the list. Overrides the mixin's itemsList and exposes it as an Angular input.

noDataPlaceholder.description: Placeholder configuration for the multi-list component when no data is available.

searchDisableFeatureName.description: Feature flag name; when the flag is enabled, the search input is hidden.

searchFilter.description: Current search query used to filter list items.

selectedItemId.description: ID of the currently selected list item.

showNoDataBlankState.description: Indicates whether to show the "no data" blank state when the list is empty.

currentPageChange.description: Event emitted when the current page index changes.

itemClicked.description: Event emitted when a user clicks a list item.

itemFocused.description: Event emitted when a list item receives focus.

loadData.description: Event emitted to request loading additional list data.

searchFilterChange.description: Event emitted when the search filter value changes.

components.description: Multi-tab list component with search, paging, combined mode, and selectable items. Used for detail-like tabbed data views.
useCases: Select multiple records from a list
components.whenToUse: Use to select multiple records from a list.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

format.description: Numeric display format. `decimalPrecision` controls how many fractional digits are rendered (e.g. `{ decimalPrecision: 2 }` → `"3.14"`).

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Numeric input for integer, decimal, money, and other number-like values.

config.description: Chip presentation + filter-type-specific config (`BaseQuickFilterConfig`): `caption` (required, typically `#ResourceString(<name>_config_caption)#`), `hint?`, `icon?`, `iconPosition?`, `defaultValue?`. Each `filterType` extends this — `lookup` adds `entitySchemaName`/`showRecordsInWindows`/`recordsFilter`, `date-range` adds `showFiscalPeriods`/`showTime`, `custom` adds `approachState`.

filterType.description: Filter style variant. Selects which inner control is rendered: `custom` (boolean toggle), `date-range` (date pickers), or `lookup` (entity picker). Required; pair with a matching `config` shape and the `_filterOptions.expose[].converters[0].args[0].quickFilterType`.

value.description: Current chip value (shape varies by `filterType`: boolean for `custom`, date-range object for `date-range`, lookup array for `lookup`). Real pages do NOT bind this directly — the `QuickFilterPreprocessor` exposes it through `_filterOptions.from = "<name>_Value"` and routes changes via `crt.QuickFilterAttributeConverter` to the target collection.

valueChange.description: Event emitted when the chip value changes. Real pages do NOT bind a request to this — the `QuickFilterPreprocessor` routes the new value into `<name>_Value` and the configured `crt.QuickFilterAttributeConverter` propagates it to the target collection's filter attribute.

components.description: Configurable quick filter component for list pages. Supports lookup, date range, checkbox, and custom filter types.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

tools.description: Tab-header tools slot: an array of child view elements rendered as action controls next to the tab caption (e.g. `crt.Button`, `crt.Icon`). Typically declared as nested `items` ops in `viewConfigDiff` with `propertyName: "tools"`.

components.description: Single tab within a TabPanel. Contains child elements shown when the tab is active.

customFilters.description: Content slot for additional filter view elements rendered alongside the built-in quick filters (date, owner, entity).

filterValues.description: Extra filter groups applied per tile schema. Each `TileFilter` targets one entity (`type`) and adds its `filter` to that tile's `FilterGroup`.

isTileReadOnly.description: Read-only toggle that disables inline edits inside individual tiles (e.g. case/email head editors).

masterEntity.description: Alternative to `masterSchemaId`: a full `LookupValue` whose `value` is the master record id. Use to bind to a related-entity attribute instead of the page's own `$Id`.

masterEntitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name of the master record. Auto-derived from the page's primary data source when not set explicitly.

masterSchemaId.description: Record id of the master entity the timeline shows activity for. Typically bound to the page's primary record via `"$Id"`.

quickFilterByOwnerConfig.description: Quick-filter dropdown config for the "filter by owner" lookup chip. Synthesized at runtime by `TimelinePreprocessor` from a `Contact` entity schema; rarely overridden by hand.

tools.description: Content slot for action toolbar buttons rendered at the top of the timeline (e.g. add note, refresh).

components.description: Timeline component displaying chronological entity activity tiles with filtering and master entity binding.

filters.type:
( | BooleanComparisonFilter | MathComparisonFilter | StringComparisonFilter | DateComparisonFilter | RelativeDateComparisonFilter | LookupComparisonFilter | IsNullComparisonFilter | IsNotNullComparisonFilter | FilterGroup
	)[]

useCases: Show records in chronological order as a timeline of events or activities
components.whenToUse: Use to show records chronologically as a timeline of activities/events.

type.description: Discriminator. Always equals the component's componentType. Emit values.type = componentType verbatim; ignore any per-component overrides.

aggregationValue.description: its string, because string | number is not supported in OpenApi

setPropertyValue.type: (name: string, value: unknown, silent: unknown) => void

componentClassFactory.description: Function for deciding the type of component to view the current record.

itemKeyProperty.description: Uses with templateValuesMapping together. Primary column name for data item model.

templateValuesMapping.description: Possibility to link custom name with data item model column name.

_reloadDependentModels.type: (model: Model, modelAttributes: string[], reloadOnlyScope: DataSourceScope) => void

copy.type: (dataSourceName: string, recordId: string, copiedValues?: JsonObject) => Observable<JsonData>

delete.type: (dataSourceName: string, parameters: ModelParameterConfig[], options?: DeleteModelRequestHandlerConfig) => Observable<DataSourceSaveResult>

getDataSourceLoadParameters.type: (dataSourceName: string, modelLoadConfiguration?: Record<string, Record<string, unknown>>) => Promise<DataSourceLoadParameters>
